item.title:
Most partners are still selling meetings. The leaders are already selling outcomes.
This week we ho...
item.description: Most partners are still selling meetings. The leaders are already selling outcomes. This week we hosted a Partner Luncheon focused on the future of work. We virtually "traveled" to the Zoom Executive Briefing Center (EBC) in Singapore to witness the next evolution of collaboration. The star of the show? Zoom AI Companion. We didn’t just talk about AI; we demonstrated how it’s becoming a true "system of action." From agentic workflows that automate post-meeting tasks to the new AI-first canvases, we showed our partners how these tools: - Differentiate their portfolio in a crowded market. - Transform customer conversations from passive meetings into active results. - Scale productivity using the latest AI Companion 3.0 innovations. A huge thank you to our partners for joining us on this tour. The future isn't just about being connected. It's about being AI-empowered. hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #Zoom hashtag #ZoomEBC hashtag #AICompanion hashtag #FutureOfWork hashtag #SaaS hashtag #PartnerEcosystem hashtag #GoToMarket hashtag #AgenticAI Canon Hongkong Co., Ltd. KYOCERA Document Solutions Hong Kong Limited Tech-Trans Telecom (China) Limited HKBN ITAPPS IGS NCS Group Konica Minolta Business Solutions Hong Kong Master Concept Group ESi - Expert Systems IVR (Asia) Co. Ltd. TOPPAN Information Solution (Hong Kong) Limited Michelle Leung , CPA Stephen Liu Victor Leung

item.title: Last Friday, we gathered at the Grand Millennium Kuala Lumpur for an intimate Executive Tea Meetup t...
item.description: Last Friday, we gathered at the Grand Millennium Kuala Lumpur for an intimate Executive Tea Meetup to discuss a pressing challenge: How do we move beyond basic chatbots to true AI-driven support? A huge thank you to Charmaine M. (@FIN AI Intercom) for a brilliant deep dive into how Fin for Freshdesk is fundamentally changing the cost-per-ticket equation. Three key takeaways from our discussion: 1. Accuracy > Speed: Automation is useless if the customer still has to call a human. Fin’s ability to handle complex queries is the real game-changer. 2. The "Resolution" Metric: We’re moving away from simple "deflection" to actual "resolution" rates. 3. Context is King: AI works best when it lives natively within your Freshdesk environment—not as a bolt-on. Thank you to our partners at Rogue Asia and all the executives who joined us for the lively debate and networking. The "AI era" of customer service isn't coming — it's already here. Missed the session? DM us a "DEMO" and I’ll send you the use-case breakdown we shared during the event. Victor Leung Kuna Nadarajan Yoon Loong Ng hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #FINAI hashtag #RogueAsia hashtag #Intercom hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #KLEvents hashtag #GenerativeAI

item.title: With Easter and Ching Ming aligning, Hong Kong is about to hit a unique pause button. At Finda Cloud...
item.description: With Easter and Ching Ming aligning, Hong Kong is about to hit a unique pause button. At Finda Cloud, we’re using this extended break to gear up for a massive Q2. Wishing all our local partners a restful 5-day weekend. Whether you’re honoring traditions or chasing the sun, make it count! See you back on Wednesday. 🐰 Finda Cloud Technology Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Chris Chu Liz T. item.title: With our official launch as a new @Zoom distributor in Hong Kong, a question we often hear from IT p...
item.description: With our official launch as a new @Zoom distributor in Hong Kong, a question we often hear from IT providers is: Why partner with Finda Cloud instead of going direct? As a Value-Added Distributor, we go beyond just providing the licenses. When you partner with us, you get: - Competitive Pricing & Margins: Exclusive channel pricing structures that help you maximize your profitability. - On-the-Ground Support: Dedicated, local account management right here in Hong Kong. - Streamlined Procurement: Localized HKD billing, flexible terms, and easier purchasing processes. - Tailored Enablement: We actively help our channel partners build their go-to-market strategies so they can sell with confidence. We are thrilled to empower local organizations with world-class communication tools. Read the full feature below! 🔗 Learn more about our Zoom partner programs: https://lnkd.in/gZeVzMNQ hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #Zoom hashtag #Distribution hashtag #HongKong hashtag #SaaS

item.title: We gathered with Hong Kong's top IT providers and channel partners to celebrate a major milestone: F...
item.description: We gathered with Hong Kong's top IT providers and channel partners to celebrate a major milestone: Finda Cloud is officially a new distributor for Zoom in Hong Kong! A massive thank you to everyone who joined us to discuss the future of modern work. As hybrid environments continue to evolve, we are thrilled to equip our local ecosystem with comprehensive access to Zoom’s world-class suite of video, phone, and chat solutions. We are committed to providing the on-the-ground support and streamlined procurement you need to confidently support your clients' digital transformation. Missed the event but want to learn how to partner with us? Let's connect! 🔗 Discover our enablement programs here: https://lnkd.in/gZeVzMNQ Finda Cloud Technology Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Chris Chu Liz T. item.title: Finda Cloud Technology Limited is pleased to announce a new distribution partnership with Zoom for t...
item.description: Finda Cloud Technology Limited is pleased to announce a new distribution partnership with Zoom for the Hong Kong market. By adding Zoom to our expanding cloud ecosystem, we are providing our network of local channel partners with comprehensive access to Zoom’s suite of SaaS communication and collaboration solutions. We look forward to delivering the on-the-ground support and streamlined procurement processes that Hong Kong IT providers require to drive digital transformation for their clients. To read the full press release and learn more about our Zoom solutions, please visit our website: https://bit.ly/4bHXZCE Zoom Jacob Pereira Boon Leong Ong Michelle Leung , CPA Stephen Liu Weishin Tee Joyce Lee Finda Cloud Technology Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Chris Chu Liz T. item.title: Having a great time catching up with enterprise IT leaders at today's luncheon. As a local Hong Kong...
item.description: Having a great time catching up with enterprise IT leaders at today's luncheon. As a local Hong Kong distributor, we know that nothing beats an in-person chat to build trust and easily catch up on new product updates. But when you head back to the office to manage IT across dozens of fast-paced retail or F&B locations, you need instant, reliable remote solutions. That’s exactly what we deliver through the TeamViewer ONE and TeamViewer DEX platforms: * Deep endpoint visibility across all devices * Frictionless remote support for quick fixes * A seamless Digital Employee Experience (DEX) Great partnerships are built in person, but great IT is supported remotely. Let’s do both! If we missed each other today, drop me a message to connect. TeamViewer Finda Cloud Technology Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Tang Jason Bianca Ho Jerman Ng Samuel Hon Dominic Tam Hok Keung LUK Dennis Tang Laurence Lim Liz T. Winky Chau hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #SaaSDistributor hashtag #TeamViewerDex hashtag #TeamViewerONE hashtag #EnterpriseIT hashtag #RemoteSupport

item.title:
Finda Cloud wishing you a Joyful Year of the Horse! | 馬年吉祥，萬事如意！
Happy Lunar New Year! 🐎 May the Ye...
item.description:
Finda Cloud wishing you a Joyful Year of the Horse! | 馬年吉祥，萬事如意！
Happy Lunar New Year! 🐎 May the Year of the Horse bring you health, happiness, and "Ma Dao Cheng Gong". We’ll be officially back to work on February 23rd, just in time for "Renri" (the 7th day). Let’s make this year one for the history books!
祝大家馬年大吉，新春快樂！願新的一年大家身體健康、事業順利、馬到功成！我們將於 2月23日（正月初七，「人日」） 正式回歸工作崗位。讓我們在馬年一起大展宏圖，馬到功成！

item.title: Effective digital strategy starts with a clear understanding of business needs before the first line...
item.description: Effective digital strategy starts with a clear understanding of business needs before the first line of code is ever considered. Today, Finda Cloud and HAND Global Solutions co-hosted an executive luncheon in Singapore to discuss this exact principle. It was a pleasure to connect with regional leaders to explore the shifting demands of the modern enterprise. Our discussion highlighted how Freshworks is helping organizations bridge the gap between complex operations and seamless user experiences. By prioritizing intuitive design and agility, Freshworks enables businesses to: * Modernize legacy workflows without the typical complexity. * Scale service delivery at the pace of business growth. * Deliver measurable value to both employees and customers. Thank you to the team at HAND Global Solutions for your partnership, and to our guests for the insightful dialogue. Finally, our thanks to Freshworks for your continued trust and support. hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #HandGlobal hashtag #Freshworks hashtag #APACDistributor hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #ITSM hashtag #ITAM hashtag #CMDB hashtag #device42 Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Lorraiine Lee Keith Liew Gary Yeo Kaushik Sekar Ameya Marathe

item.title: It’s been over a week, and we are still reflecting on the incredible conversations and connections m...
item.description:
It’s been over a week, and we are still reflecting on the incredible conversations and connections made. At Finda Cloud, our mission is to curate the best SaaS solutions out there — for enterprises, companies, and schools across APAC. This event was a perfect reminder of why we do what we do: bringing the community together to spark real innovation. 🎥 Watch the highlights below to see the ecosystem in action.
A huge thank you to our partners Canvas by Instructure , ESTHA , Intercom , Freshworks , GlobalSign APAC, KYOCERA Document Solutions Hong Kong Limited, SuperOps, SurveySparrow , TeamViewer and Zoom for the insights.
Curious about the best solutions for your enterprise or school? Send us a message! We’d love to connect you with the right technology.
Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Monir Khan 簡文龍 Chris Chu KK Lee Coburn LIN Jin Kwong Liz T. Erin Chow Winky Chau

item.title: At Finda Cloud, we know that being a distributor is about the ecosystem we build together. We cannot...
item.description: At Finda Cloud, we know that being a distributor is about the ecosystem we build together. We cannot work alone; our success depends entirely on the strength and trust of our partners. Celebrating the incredible companies that went above and beyond at last Friday’s Solution Summit was a major highlight. It was an honor to recognize those who have demonstrated exceptional innovation and commitment. A huge round of applause to our 2026 award winners: Most Supportive Partner TOPPAN Information Solution (Hong Kong) Limited Most Creative Partner Integrated Global Solutions Limited (IGS) Collaboration Hero KYOCERA Document Solutions Hong Kong Limited Active Connection Star PCCW GLOBAL Limited Rising Star Partner Bigazines Consulting Limited Rising Star Partner UPNX Asia Most Valuable Reseller Master Concept Group Thank you for working alongside us to shape the future of cloud. item.title: A major highlight of last Friday’s Finda Cloud Solution Summit was our Executive Luncheon. It was a ...
item.description: A major highlight of last Friday’s Finda Cloud Solution Summit was our Executive Luncheon. It was a privilege to host such a visionary group of leaders to discuss the strategic roadmap for 2026. We know how busy this time of year is, so a sincere thank you to those who joined us. Your time, energy, and "big picture" insights are what made this session so impactful. Special thanks to our sponsors again, Canvas by Instructure , ESTHA , Intercom , Freshworks , GlobalSign APAC, Kyocera, SuperOps, SurveySparrow , TeamViewer and Zoom , for making this exclusive gathering possible. Thank you to our attendees: Terrence S. Samuel Hon Raymond Lee Arthur Wong Leo Cheng Alex Chan Aaron Lee Simon Lau Eric Lam Dianty Zora Nindita Pion Cheung Andy Bien Tony Mok Michelle Leung , CPA Javeeth Ahamed Wilson Ma Mars Yip Kevin Mok Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Liz T. hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #SolutionSummit hashtag #ExecutiveNetworking

item.title: Happy New Year from Finda Cloud! As we step into 2026, we’re excited to introduce a new face for th...
item.description:
Happy New Year from Finda Cloud! As we step into 2026, we’re excited to introduce a new face for the journey ahead: the Finda Buddy. Inspired by the cloud in our company logo, we created this little one to bring a human touch to the "invisible" world of cloud software, turning abstract technology into something friendly and approachable. Whether he’s serving as your go-to companion for solving complex challenges or acting as a physical reminder that powerful software should be lightweight and stress-free, the Finda Buddy is here to scale alongside you this year. Thank you for being part of our story, we can’t wait to reach new heights together in 2026!

item.title:
Strengthening the APAC Cloud Ecosystem for 2026 🌏☁️
At Finda Cloud, we believe that strong technolo...
item.description: Strengthening the APAC Cloud Ecosystem for 2026 🌏☁️ At Finda Cloud, we believe that strong technology is built on even stronger relationships. As we wrap up a dynamic 2025, our VP - Asia, Victor Leung and Regional Business Development Director, Kelvin Cheung, has been on the ground visiting our key vendor partners across Singapore, Malaysia, and Taiwan. These face-to-face sessions are vital. They allow us to align on roadmaps, understand local market nuances, and ensure our distribution strategy is ready for the next wave of cloud innovation. The feedback from our partners has been clear: the region is ready for growth. We are bringing back exciting new strategies to support our channel network. The foundation is set. item.title: We are excited to invite you to an insightful webinar organized by GlobalSign GMO in partnership wit...
item.description: We are excited to invite you to an insightful webinar organized by GlobalSign GMO in partnership with Finda Cloud Technology: Discovery GMO Sign's World: How Digital Signatures Transform Business Growth Date: November 28, 2025 (Friday) Time: 3:00 PM - 4:00 PM (GMT+8) HKT Format: Teams Registeration: https://sprw.io/stt-DNt6m Webinar Highlights: Introduction to GlobalSign: Learn how GlobalSign, a trusted Certificate Authority (CA), is essential for identity security and encryption. Exploring GMO Sign: 🌟 Discover how GMO Sign enhances the digital signature landscape: 🌟 Understand the unique role of GMO Sign as both a CA and a provider of digital signatures in trusted compliance. 🌟 Compare GMO Sign with other solutions like DocuSign and Adobe Sign, and discover what sets us apart. How to Utilize GMO Sign’s Digital Signatures: 🌟 Get step-by-step guidance on applying for and using GMO Sign’s digital signatures effectively. 🌟 Learn how quickly you can adopt digital signatures in your business processes. Exclusive Offers for Attendees: 🌟 Register now and receive 20 free e-signatures as a welcome gift! Take advantage of exclusive offers available during the webinar. Register Now! Don’t miss this opportunity to revolutionize your business practices with digital signatures. Click here to secure your spot! We look forward to seeing you there! Kelvin Cheung Victor Leung Rocky Chen Pion Cheung Carol Low (Wye Yee) Ho Shu Heng

item.title: A strong week in Manila at the GlobalSign APAC Partner Summit — and an even stronger milestone for F...
item.description: A strong week in Manila at the GlobalSign APAC Partner Summit — and an even stronger milestone for Finda Cloud. Proud to share that Finda Cloud Technology Limited has been awarded the Master Reseller Recognition for Territorial Expansion Excellence as a New Partner. This award reflects what matters most to us: driving pipeline, expanding market reach, and accelerating revenue with our vendor and channel ecosystem across APAC. Our partnership with GlobalSign is growing fast — strong demand, clear customer wins, and solid momentum in key markets. With our sales engine, regional presence, and fulfilment capability, we’re ready to take this collaboration to the next level. Big thanks to the GlobalSign APAC team for the trust and for an impactful summit in Manila. Let’s keep building, closing, and scaling together. 🚀 hashtag #Sales hashtag #APAC hashtag #GlobalSign hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #ChannelSales hashtag #Growth hashtag #SaaSDistribution hashtag #Partnerships Tan J.

item.title: We're excited to announce Finda Cloud Technology is the official APAC distributor for Prosfinity's A...
item.description: We're excited to announce Finda Cloud Technology is the official APAC distributor for Prosfinity's AIShieldNet! Traditional EDR solutions rely on signatures, leaving a gap for zero-day attacks. AIShieldNet closes this gap. It's the first AI Zero Day Response (ZDR) solution that uses advanced AI (LLMs) to set a new standard in endpoint security. Why AIShieldNet? - Real-Time Zero-Day Detection: Analyzes 100% of processes without signatures to stop fileless malware and novel attacks. - Stops Alert Fatigue: The AI filters noise and provides clear, natural-language explanations, letting your team focus on real threats. - Catches What EDR Misses: Understands behavior and intent, not just patterns. Finda Cloud is proud to bring this next-gen AI-driven cybersecurity to the APAC region. Contact us to learn how to secure your organization against modern threats! https://prosfinity.com/ hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #Prosfinity hashtag #AIShieldNet hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #AI hashtag #ZDR hashtag #EDR hashtag #APAC hashtag #Partnership hashtag #ZeroDayAttack
item.content:encoded: We're excited to announce Finda Cloud Technology is the official APAC distributor for Prosfinity's AIShieldNet! Traditional EDR solutions rely on signatures, leaving a gap for zero-day attacks. AIShieldNet closes this gap. It's the first AI Zero Day Response (ZDR) solution that uses advanced AI (LLMs) to set a new standard in endpoint security. Why AIShieldNet? - Real-Time Zero-Day Detection: Analyzes 100% of processes without signatures to stop fileless malware and novel attacks. - Stops Alert Fatigue: The AI filters noise and provides clear, natural-language explanations, letting your team focus on real threats. - Catches What EDR Misses: Understands behavior and intent, not just patterns. Finda Cloud is proud to bring this next-gen AI-driven cybersecurity to the APAC region. Contact us to learn how to secure your organization against modern threats! https://prosfinity.com/ hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #Prosfinity hashtag #AIShieldNet hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #AI hashtag #ZDR hashtag #EDR hashtag #APAC hashtag #Partnership hashtag #ZeroDayAttack

item.title: We are thrilled to share that Finda Cloud Technology has partnered with Fin Intercom for an insightf...
item.description: We are thrilled to share that Finda Cloud Technology has partnered with Fin Intercom for an insightful luncheon event! A big thank you to Keith Chan and Julian Chou for their engaging product introduction and demo. 🌟"Fin: Building the Future of Customer Service." It was an inspiring gathering where innovation meets customer connection.🌟 Key takeaways included: - Instant answers to customer questions, 24/7 - Enhanced agent effectiveness with AI tools - Gaining deep insights from conversations using AI analytics - Strategies to improve service quality while reducing costs A heartfelt thank you to all our guests for joining us and contributing to a fantastic discussion. Together, we’re paving the way for a new era in customer service! item.title: What an incredible experience at Zoom Zoomtopia Partner Connect Asia in Singapore! This trip has bee...
item.description: What an incredible experience at Zoom Zoomtopia Partner Connect Asia in Singapore! This trip has been truly amazing and profoundly meaningful for me. It was fantastic to join the event and connect with so many brilliant minds in the reseller community. A massive thank you to Stephen Liu, Jacob Pereira, Vishal Amin, Weishin Tee and John Kao for making this trip such a success! Your support and partnership are invaluable. It was also a pleasure meeting Manish Sharma, Smile Huang, Gerald Tan, Gary Yeo, Priyanka Chandramouli, Nuno Pereira, Eric Lam, Raysen Chan , Yanko Dzhukev, Perry... and so many other wonderful partners Kyocera Document Solutions Singapore Pte Ltd, DYXnet, We+ Asia, ARCONIS LTD, ESTHA, Freshworks, SIFT Analytics Group... Building these relationships is key, and we are excited about the prospect of continuing to build more and more businesses with all of you. Here's to a future of collaboration and success! 🤝 Victor Leung Finda Cloud Technology hashtag #Zoomtopia hashtag #PartnerConnect hashtag #Singapore hashtag #Partnership hashtag #BusinessGrowth hashtag #Reseller hashtag #Zoom hashtag #Findacloud hashtag #Kyocera hashtag #Freshworks hashtag #Estha hashtag #Distributor

It was also a pleasure meeting Manish Sharma, Smile Huang, Gerald Tan, Gary Yeo, Priyanka Chandramouli, Nuno Pereira, Eric Lam, Raysen Chan , Yanko Dzhukev, Perry... and so many other wonderful partners Kyocera Document Solutions Singapore Pte Ltd, DYXnet, We+ Asia, ARCONIS LTD, ESTHA, Freshworks, SIFT Analytics Group... Building these relationships is key, and we are excited about the prospect of continuing to build more and more businesses with all of you. Here's to a future of collaboration and success! 🤝 Victor Leung Finda Cloud Technology hashtag #Zoomtopia hashtag #PartnerConnect hashtag #Singapore hashtag #Partnership hashtag #BusinessGrowth hashtag #Reseller hashtag #Zoom hashtag #Findacloud hashtag #Kyocera hashtag #Freshworks hashtag #Estha hashtag #Distributor

item.description: 🌟 Exciting Highlights from the Fin Intercom x We+ Asia x Finda Cloud Technology Luncheon!🌟 Today, together with our dedicated reseller We+ Asia, we had the pleasure of hosting a fantastic event focused on "Fin: Building the Future of Customer Service." It was an inspiring gathering where innovation meets customer connection. Key takeaways included: - Instant answers to customer questions, 24/7 - Enhanced agent effectiveness with AI tools - Gaining deep insights from conversations using AI analytics - Strategies to improve service quality while reducing costs A heartfelt thank you to everyone who attended and contributed to the discussions! item.title: You already know the power of customer feedback. What you may not have is a reliable way to capture ...
item.description: You already know the power of customer feedback. What you may not have is a reliable way to capture it at every turn. That’s where we come in. Join us on September 5 for the first session of our 5-part series from SurveySparrow and Finda Cloud Technology, hosted by Monir Khan 簡文龍and Parul G. In just 60 minutes, you will learn to: ✅ Map your customer journey and identify prime feedback moments ✅ Deploy classic, CX-focused, and AI-powered surveys ✅ Unify and analyze every response in a single platform Can’t make the English session? We’ve got you covered with a Cantonese session on September 4 led by Jin Kwong and KK Lee. If you’re a brand or reseller partner in the APAC region, this is for you. 👉 Register now: https://bit.ly/45nvE2r Rindya Nelson | Manoj Ravichandran hashtag #RefineExperience hashtag #SurveySparrowPartners hashtag #CustomerExperience

item.title: Finda Cloud Technology is thrilled to announce our new partnership with We+ Asia, a leader in IT and...
item.description: Finda Cloud Technology is thrilled to announce our new partnership with We+ Asia, a leader in IT and digital solutions. We are excited to welcome them to them ever-expanding ecosystem of resellers. We+ brings a wealth of expertise in digital transformation, application development, and IT infrastructure. Their commitment to excellence and a proactive, strategic approach to client services perfectly aligns with our own values. This partnership will undoubtedly bring significant value to our customers. By combining We+'s consulting prowess with our robust portfolio of solutions, including Freshworks and Device42, A Freshworks Company, we are poised to create powerful, comprehensive offerings that will drive innovation and efficiency for businesses. We are confident that this collaboration will unlock new opportunities and generate immense value for our mutual clients. Join us in extending a warm welcome to the We+ team! We are excited to embark on this journey together and look forward to a future of shared success. André Teixeira Gomes, PMP Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #WePlus hashtag #NewPartner hashtag #Reseller hashtag #ITsolutions hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #Freshworks hashtag #Device42 hashtag #Partnership hashtag #TechEcosystem

item.title:
🚀 提升您的客戶體驗，選擇 SurveySparrow！🚀
在 Finda Cloud Technology，我們很高興能與 SurveySparrow 合作，改變企業與客戶之間的連結方式。我們的統...
item.description: 🚀 提升您的客戶體驗，選擇 SurveySparrow！🚀 在 Finda Cloud Technology，我們很高興能與 SurveySparrow 合作，改變企業與客戶之間的連結方式。我們的統一客戶聲音（VOC）平台提供一系列強大的工具，幫助您不僅收集反饋，更能真正理解並提升您的客戶體驗。 🔹 對話式問卷：提升超過 40% 的回應率！我們的互動調查讓反饋變得有趣且簡單。 🔹 工單系統：縮短反饋循環，將挑戰轉化為機會，確保每個聲音都能被聽見。 🔹 自動化：節省時間，通過無縫整合進入您現有的技術堆棧，簡化流程。 🔹 Omnichannel分享：在客戶所在的任何地方收集寶貴的反饋，無論是線上還是線下。 🔹 AI 文本分析：在幾分鐘內發現 CX 數據中的市場洞察，幫助您做出明智的決策。 🔹 聲譽管理：通過管理 100 多個平台上的評論來建立信任，確保您的品牌穩健。 與 Xerox、McDonald's 及 World Health Organization等領先品牌一起，利用我們的平台大規模推動增長。 👉 瀏覽我們的最新見解，讓我們一起提升您的客戶體驗！ 追蹤及聯絡我們 👉https://lnkd.in/g_W3PC6w ------------------------------------ ☎電話：+852 9623 6682 📩電郵：hello@finda.cloud 📲WhatsApp: https://wa.link/m9lx77 hashtag #客戶體驗 hashtag #SurveySparrow hashtag #FindaCloudTechnology hashtag #反饋重要 hashtag #商業增長 hashtag #客戶聲音

🚀 Elevate Your Customer Experience with SurveySparrow! 🚀
At FindaCloud, we are excited to partner w...
item.description: 🚀 Elevate Your Customer Experience with SurveySparrow! 🚀 At FindaCloud, we are excited to partner with SurveySparrow to transform how businesses connect with their customers. Our unified Voice of Customer (VOC) platform offers a suite of powerful tools that help you not just gather feedback, but truly understand and enhance your customer experience. 🔹 Conversational Surveys: Boost response rates by over 40%! Our engaging surveys make feedback fun and easy. 🔹 Ticketing System: Close the feedback loop and turn challenges into opportunities, ensuring no voice goes unheard. 🔹 Automation: Save time and streamline processes with seamless integrations into your existing tech stack. 🔹 Omnichannel Sharing: Collect valuable feedback wherever your customers are, online or offline. 🔹 AI Text Analytics: Discover hidden insights from your CX data in minutes, helping you make informed decisions. 🔹 Reputation Management: Build trust by managing reviews across 100+ platforms, ensuring your brand stands strong. 🌟 Join leading brands like Xerox, McDonald's, Love, Bonito, RedDoorz, Sendle, Austal and World Health Organization in leveraging our platform to drive growth at scale. Schedule a demo and get solution case studies now! 👉 https://lnkd.in/g_W3PC6w ------------------------------------ ☎ Phone: +852 9623 6682 📩 Email: hello@finda.cloud 📲 WhatsApp: https://wa.link/m9lx77 👉 Swipe through our latest insights and let’s elevate your customer experience together! hashtag #CustomerExperience hashtag #SurveySparrow hashtag #FindaCloudTechnology hashtag #FeedbackMatters hashtag #BusinessGrowth hashtag #VoiceOfCustomer

item.title:
🌟Balancing AI Innovation and Security🌟
We're thrilled to announce that our Regional Development Dir...
item.description:
🌟Balancing AI Innovation and Security🌟
We're thrilled to announce that our Regional Development Director, Kelvin Cheung, was invited by TVB (Television Broadcasts Limited) News Division for an interview on 時事多面睇 (A Closer Look).
As the application of artificial intelligence (AI) becomes increasingly widespread, many employees are uploading documents and utilizing systems for data analysis and integration. This naturally raises questions about the risk of data leakage.
In the interview, Kelvin Cheung emphasized the critical need for enhanced risk management. He shared essential considerations for both employees and enterprises when using AI systems to ensure the protection of confidential materials.
Tune in to discover how organizations can safely embrace AI innovation while safeguarding their data integrity. 👉 https://lnkd.in/g_W3PC6w ------------------------------------ ☎ Phone: +852 9623 6682 📩 Email: hello@finda.cloud 📲 WhatsApp: https://wa.link/m9lx77
hashtag #AI hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #Innovation hashtag #FindaCloudTechnology hashtag #TVBNews hashtag #Leadership hashtag #DataProtection hashtag #RiskManagement

item.description: 🏃 Graylog：強化您的安全策略！ 現今的快速發展的數碼環境中，網絡安全是不少企業的不能忽視的一環。 網絡威脅日益複雜，加上嚴格的監管要求，安全信息及事件管理（SIEM）解決方案絕對是至關重要。 各種規模的企業需要依賴更強大的 SIEM 工具來獲得應用程式及網絡硬件產生的安全警報，以進行全面的即時分析，使他們能夠在潛在攻擊之前及早應對。 沒有合適的 SIEM，安全團隊經常面臨數據過載的問題，讓他們難以達成威脅檢測、調查和響應（TDIR）等目標。 無論您是考慮首次使用 SIEM，抑或希望系統升級，投資Graylog, Inc. 是安全團隊成功的關鍵。 想了解更多？立即預約諮詢及獲取解決方案案例 追蹤及聯絡我們 👉https://lnkd.in/g_W3PC6w ------------------------------------ ☎電話：+852 9623 6682 📩電郵：hello@finda.cloud 📲WhatsApp: https://wa.link/m9lx77 hashtag #SIEM hashtag #Graylog hashtag #網絡安全 hashtag #威脅檢測 hashtag #FindaCloudTechnology

In today’s digital landscape, Security Inform...
item.description: 🏃 Elevate Your Security Operations with Graylog, Inc. In today’s digital landscape, Security Information and Event Management (SIEM) solutions are crucial for effective SecOps. Organizations of all sizes depend on robust SIEM tools to gain comprehensive visibility, enabling them to detect threats early, respond swiftly, and stay ahead of potential attacks. Without the right SIEM, security teams often face data overload, making it challenging to meet their Threat Detection, Investigation, and Response (TDIR) goals. Whether you’re considering your first SIEM or looking to upgrade from one that no longer meets your needs, investing in Graylog, Inc. Security is the key to empowering your security team for success. item.description: Why Are Companies Moving to On-Premise eSignature Solutions? 🔐 When handling confidential or regulated data, relying on external cloud providers can raise serious concerns around privacy, compliance, and control. The risks aren’t just hypothetical — they’re growing. That’s why more organizations are turning to on-premise eSignature solutions to maintain complete control over their sensitive documents and audit trails. ✨ With elDoc’s On-Premise eSignature Solution, you get: ✅ Complete data sovereignty — all data stays within your infrastructure ✅ Full control over encryption, access, and security policies ✅ Regulatory compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, eIDAS & local laws ✅ Custom workflows & branding with ERP, CRM, IAM integrations ✅ Offline-ready for high-availability environments ✅ Predictable TCO — no recurring cloud service fees 🔏 elDoc supports trusted Document Signing Certificates from established CAs, ensuring every signature is secure, verifiable, and legally binding. item.title: | Register Now! SurveySparrow Webinar | 🏃 Feedback to Fortune: Why Listening Drives Brand and Reve...
item.description: | Register Now! SurveySparrow Webinar | 🏃 Feedback to Fortune: Why Listening Drives Brand and Revenue?✨ Most brands collect more data than they can process. Reports arrive too late, priorities blur, and departments chase separate goals. In one focused session, you will see a step-by-step method that cuts through the noise, ranks issues by business impact, and routes clear actions to the people who can solve them, before loyalty slips. You will watch a real story unfold: a single online complaint surfaces, is flagged within hours, triggers a quick product tweak, and appears as measurable revenue on the next board slide. Then we hand you the playbook so you can replicate the process, prove the numbers, and protect your budget. 📝 By the end, you will know how to: 📍 Reduce the time from customer signal to team action from weeks to hours 📍Lift response rates across email, SMS, and other channels without extra headcount 📍Link every CX decision to retention, upsell, and new revenue figures 🙋‍♀️ Who should attend? Leaders in CX, product, marketing, or operations who need faster insight, sharper priorities, and a direct line between customer voice and business results. 📅 Date: June 17, 2025 ⏰ Time: 1.30PM (5.30AM GMT) 🗣️ Format: Webinar ---------------------------------------- ☎ Phone: +852 9623 6682 📩 Email: hello@finda.cloud 📲 WhatsApp: https://wa.link/m9lx77

item.description: 為什麼愈來愈多公司選擇On-Premise電子簽名解決方案？🔐 一文睇清elDoc六大優勢✨ 在處理機密或受管制的文件時，如果依賴第三方雲端服務供應商，往往可能會引發私隱、合規性、控制等重大隱憂。因此，愈來愈多公司轉用On-Premise電子簽名解決方案，可以更安全、更高效地管理檔案。 ✨ 使用 elDoc的六大優勢： ✅ 安全文件共用：僅與授權方共用您的文檔、並做到中央文件存儲到中央文件存儲 ✅ 加密驗證：使用高級加密技術及多重身份驗證保護機密資料 ✅ 具法律效力：符合 GDPR、HIPAA、eIDAS 及當地法律的合規性 ✅ 自訂工作流程：與 ERP、CRM、IAM 整合工作流程及品牌設計 ✅ 離線處理文件：為高可用性環境特設離線功能 ✅ 成本管理：可預計總成本、無需定期的雲服務費用 📎 想了解更多 elDoc？ 追蹤及聯絡我們 👉https://lnkd.in/g_W3PC6w ------------------------------------ ☎電話：+852 9623 6682 📩電郵：hello@finda.cloud 📲WhatsApp: https://wa.link/m9lx77 hashtag #eSignature hashtag #OnPremise hashtag #DataSecurity hashtag #Compliance hashtag #elDoc hashtag #DocumentExcellence hashtag #EnterpriseIT hashtag #DigitalSigning hashtag #DocumentManagement hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #FindaCloudTechnology

item.description:
🎥 Check Out the Highlights from Finda Cloud Technology Solution Day! 🚀
What a fantastic day we had last Friday at the Sheraton Hong Kong! 🌟 We’re excited to share the highlights from our Finda Cloud Solution Day!
From engaging discussions to eye-opening product demos, it was a day full of inspiration and connection. Our amazing vendors showcased their latest innovations, and the energy in the room was truly electric!
Don’t miss our highlight video—relive the best moments and see how we’re all working together to shape the future of cloud technology!
A big thank you to everyone who joined us! Your support and enthusiasm made this event unforgettable. Let’s keep the conversation going and continue this journey of innovation together!
Interested in being one of our partners? 🤝 👉 Contact Finda Cloud Technology "hello@finda.cloud" for more info!

item.title:
🌟 Thank You for a Successful Finda Cloud Technology Solution Day! 🌟
Last Friday, we had the pleasur...
item.description: 🌟 Thank You for a Successful Finda Cloud Technology Solution Day! 🌟 Last Friday, we had the pleasure of hosting our Finda Cloud Solution Day at the Sheraton Hong Kong Hotel & Towers. The event was a fantastic opportunity for professionals across the industry to come together and explore the latest advancements in cloud technology. 🏨✨ We would like to extend our heartfelt gratitude to all the sponsors, Freshworks, TeamViewer, Tencent Cloud, Vimeo, KYOCERA Document Solutions Hong Kong Limited, SurveySparrow, Graylog, Inc., PCCW GLOBAL Limited Console Connect , HAND Global Solutions, who set up booths and showcased their innovative solutions. Your engaging product introductions provided invaluable insights and sparked inspiring conversations among attendees. It’s your expertise and dedication that drive our industry forward! To all participants, thank you for your enthusiasm and active engagement. Your presence made the event truly special, and we hope you left with new knowledge, connections, and ideas to implement in your organizations. Events like these remind us of the power of collaboration and community. We are excited about the partnerships forged and the collective growth that lies ahead as we navigate this ever-evolving landscape together. We look forward to more opportunities to connect, learn, and innovate. Stay tuned for upcoming events and initiatives from Finda Cloud Technology! item.title:
🌟 Thank You Freshworks for an Unforgettable Evening! 🌟
"Just one drink. Ok?" — that's how legendary...
item.description: 🌟 Thank You Freshworks for an Unforgettable Evening! 🌟 "Just one drink. Ok?" — that's how legendary stories begin, and what a story we created at the annual Freshworks Soiree Evening! A heartfelt thank you to Freshworks for inviting Finda Cloud Technology to this wonderful gathering at the Quaich Bar, InterContinental Singapore. It was a night filled with camaraderie, insightful conversations, and the promise of collaboration. As the APAC distributer of Freshworks, we were thrilled to connect with so many incredible C-Suite leaders who shared their thoughts on the power of open communication and the transformative impact of AI in our work lives, contributing to an evening of shared insights and friendships. It was truly a night to remember. Looking forward to the next Soiree and continuing our journey together!🥂 Interested in accelerating your digital transformation? 🚀 👉 Contact Finda Cloud Technology to explore how Freshworks can elevate your ITSM experience! François Teo Simon Ma KokMun (KM) Liew Priyanka Chandramouli Keith Liew Bobby Chan Arunima Singh Samir Akhtar Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung Lorraiine Lee Dennis Wong Derek Chan Sue Tan KAR SOON YAP Ken Ng Freshworks for Partners Benjamin Hoo Montri Trainaphakul Kaushik Sekar Peerachat K. David CK Chin Allan Tan Stanley A. item.description: We are thrilled to invite you to Finda Cloud’s Solution Day, where industry leaders and innovators will explore how AI-driven solutions are reshaping departments across organizations—from HR and IT to Marketing, Operations, and beyond. Event Details: 📅 Date:Friday, 30 May 2025 🕑 Time:2:00 PM (Registration) – 5:00 PM (Close) 📍 Venue:Sheraton Hong Kong Hotel & Towers, 4/F | 20 Nathan Road, Tsim Sha Tsui Why Attend? ✅ Discover AI Innovations: Learn how AI tools streamline workflows, boost productivity, and drive decision-making for *every department. ✅ Hear from Top Vendors: Engage with experts from Tencent Cloud, Freshworks, TeamViewer, Vimeo, PCCW GLOBAL Limited, Helios, SurveySparrow, Graylog, Inc., elDoc and KYOCERA Document Solutions Hong Kong Limited. ✅ Live Demos & Case Studies: See cutting-edge AI solutions in action and explore real-world applications. ✅ Network with Peers: Connect with industry leaders and professionals navigating similar challenges. Agenda Highlights: - Keynote:The Future of Cross-Departmental AI Synergy - Panel Discussions:Vendor leaders debate AI’s role in departmental transformation. - Breakout Sessions:Tailored insights for your department’s unique needs. Register Now: 🔗 https://lnkd.in/gyfwQkdH Spaces are limited—secure your seat today! Looking forward to redefining the future of your business with you!

item.description: A huge thank you to Whatfix for inviting Finda Cloud Technology as your Hong Kong Partner! 🌟 We had a fantastic lunch gathering filled with inspiring conversations about driving digital adoption and empowering businesses with smarter workflows. What is Whatfix? Whatfix is a leading Digital Adoption Platform (DAP) that transforms how users interact with software. It offers: ✅ Interactive Guides & Tooltips for seamless onboarding. ✅ Self-Help Widgets for instant support. ✅ Analytics to optimize user engagement. ✅ Custom Flows for complex platforms like Oracle, SAP, and Salesforce. Why It Matters for Enterprises? If your team uses Oracle, SAP, or Salesforce, Whatfix can: 🔹 Reduce training time with in-app guidance. 🔹 Boost productivity by simplifying complex workflows. 🔹 Ensure compliance with step-by-step task automation. item.title: 🌟As the APAC Distributor for Device42, A Freshworks Company & Freshworks – the ultimate solution for...
item.description: 🌟As the APAC Distributor for Device42, A Freshworks Company & Freshworks – the ultimate solution for IT Asset Management and Agentless Discovery! 🚀 Is your IT team spending too much time manually tracking assets or struggling with outdated inventory data? Device42, A Freshworks Company streamlines IT operations with: ✅ Agentless Discovery – Automatically map and audit your entire IT infrastructure without installing software. ✅ Real-Time Visibility – Gain instant insights into hardware, software, and dependencies. ✅ Reduced Management Time – Cut hours of manual work with automated, accurate asset tracking. Calling all IT resellers across APAC! 🌏 (HK, Taiwan, Singapore, Australia...) We’re looking for local partners to join our network and unlock new revenue streams by delivering Device42, A Freshworks Company cutting-edge solutions to businesses. If you want to: 🔹 Expand your portfolio with a market-leading DCIM/ITAM platform 🔹 Solve critical pain points for customers (e.g., compliance, cloud migration, cost optimization) 🔹 Grow your business with dedicated support from our team Let’s collaborate! 🤝 If you’re ready to explore this lucrative opportunity and empower your customers with smarter IT management, reach out today! Finda Cloud Technology 👉 Comment below, send us a DM hello@finda.cloud, or visit http://www.device42.com to learn more. item.title:
🚀 Exciting Times with Freshwork Team!
Freshworks had the privilege of hosting a Device42, A Freshwo...
item.description: 🚀 Exciting Times with Freshwork Team! Freshworks had the privilege of hosting a Device42, A Freshworks Company Reseller Enablement Session at the AWS Office in Hong Kong! 🌏✨ We dove deep into Device 42’s game-changing ITAM solutions, spotlighting its powerful agentless discovery capabilities that effortlessly map, inventory, and audit hybrid IT environments—no software installation required. Whether it’s cloud, on-prem, or multi-cloud infrastructures, Device 42 delivers real-time visibility, accuracy, and actionable insights to optimize your IT ecosystem. 💻🔍 Key highlights: ✅ Agentless Discovery: Automate asset tracking across servers, VMs, network devices, and cloud platforms. ✅ Seamless Integration: Works on-premise and other major cloud providers. ✅ Cost Optimization: Eliminate manual audits and reduce overhead with automated, accurate data. A huge thank you to everyone who Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung François Teo Preethi Bridgement Priyanka Chandramouli joined us! 🙌 If you missed the session or want to learn how Device 42 can transform IT asset management for your organization, reach out to Finda Cloud Technology today! Let’s unlock the full potential of your IT infrastructure together. 🌟 📩 Contact us hello@finda.cloud Finda Cloud Technology for demos, partnerships, or to schedule a discovery call. hashtag #Device42 hashtag #ITAM hashtag #CloudComputing hashtag #SaaS hashtag #AssetManagement hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #Innovation hashtag #Freshworks hashtag #ITInventory
item.content:encoded: 🚀 Exciting Times with Freshwork Team! Freshworks had the privilege of hosting a Device42, A Freshworks Company Reseller Enablement Session at the AWS Office in Hong Kong! 🌏✨ We dove deep into Device 42’s game-changing ITAM solutions, spotlighting its powerful agentless discovery capabilities that effortlessly map, inventory, and audit hybrid IT environments—no software installation required. Whether it’s cloud, on-prem, or multi-cloud infrastructures, Device 42 delivers real-time visibility, accuracy, and actionable insights to optimize your IT ecosystem. 💻🔍 Key highlights: ✅ Agentless Discovery: Automate asset tracking across servers, VMs, network devices, and cloud platforms. ✅ Seamless Integration: Works on-premise and other major cloud providers. ✅ Cost Optimization: Eliminate manual audits and reduce overhead with automated, accurate data. A huge thank you to everyone who Victor Leung Kelvin Cheung François Teo Preethi Bridgement Priyanka Chandramouli joined us! 🙌 If you missed the session or want to learn how Device 42 can transform IT asset management for your organization, reach out to Finda Cloud Technology today! Let’s unlock the full potential of your IT infrastructure together. 🌟 📩 Contact us hello@finda.cloud Finda Cloud Technology for demos, partnerships, or to schedule a discovery call. hashtag #Device42 hashtag #ITAM hashtag #CloudComputing hashtag #SaaS hashtag #AssetManagement hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #Innovation hashtag #Freshworks hashtag #ITInventory

item.title: 🌐 We are thrilled to express our deepest gratitude to Tencent Cloud for inviting us to their Shenzhe...
item.description: 🌐 We are thrilled to express our deepest gratitude to Tencent Cloud for inviting us to their Shenzhen Headquarters yesterday! As an official Tencent Cloud Hong Kong Distributor, it was an incredible honor to collaborate, learn, and strengthen our partnership with one of the world’s leading cloud innovators. 🚀 A special thank you for the opportunity to support Hong Kong Retail Technology Industry Association in members during this visit – we’re passionate about empowering businesses with cutting-edge cloud solutions and exceptional service. 👋 To all our customers and partners: Whether you’re eager to explore Tencent Cloud’s state-of-the-art facilities in Shenzhen or want to discover how their cloud services can transform your business, we’re here to help! Reach out to us at hello@finda.cloud – let’s connect you to the power of Tencent Cloud’s global infrastructure, AI capabilities, and scalable solutions. 🌥️ Your journey to smarter cloud technology starts with a simple hello. 💡 hashtag #TencentCloud hashtag #CloudInnovation hashtag #DigitalTransformation hashtag #Partnership hashtag #CloudSolutions hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #TencentCloud hashtag #Distributor #HongHong Kong Retail Technology Industry Association Kelvin Cheung Dennis Kwan Vincent So Lydia Yip Victor Leung

item.description: 🚀 Incredible Day at hashtag #TheWorldCIO200 Summit Kick-off & AI Day | HK 10 April 2025! 🌟 A heartfelt thank you to SurveySparrow for your generous sponsorship and for powering meaningful conversations around AI and innovation! 🌐✨ What is SurveySparrow? SurveySparrow revolutionizes feedback management with its conversational survey platform! Designed to boost engagement, it enables businesses to: ✅ Create interactive, chat-like surveys for customers and employees. ✅ Measure and improve customer experience (CX) and employee experience (EX). ✅ Turn insights into actionable strategies with AI-driven analytics. item.title:
🚀 Boost FreshService with Device42 Integration! 🚀
Looking to streamline IT operations, improve eff...
item.description: 🚀 Boost FreshService with Device42 Integration! 🚀 Looking to streamline IT operations, improve efficiency, and gain better infrastructure visibility? Integrating hashtag #Device42 with hashtag #FreshService can help! Here’s how: Key Benefits 🔍 Automated Asset Discovery Device42 auto-discovers and updates IT assets, ensuring your hashtag #FreshService CMDB is always accurate. No more manual errors! 🛠️ Improved Incident & Change Management Get real-time asset and dependency data to quickly resolve incidents and plan changes effectively. 🌐 Enhanced Infrastructure Visibility hashtag #Device42 reveals relationships between devices, apps, and dependencies, empowering better decision-making. ⚙️ Streamlined Operations Automated sync reduces manual effort, letting your team focus on resolving issues, not managing data. 📊 Compliance & Auditing Maintain accurate records for compliance with Device42’s detailed asset tracking. 💰 Cost Optimization Identify underutilized assets and optimize IT spending. Why It Matters - Real-Time Data Sync: Keep your CMDB accurate. - Dependency Mapping: Understand change impacts. - Automated Workflows: Enable seamless updates and alerts. --- Use Cases ✅ Incident Management: Resolve issues faster. ✅ Change Management: Minimize risks with dependency maps. ✅ Asset Optimization: Reduce costs by identifying unused resources. The Bottom Line hashtag #Device42 + hashtag #FreshService = Better IT asset management, faster incident resolution, and cost savings. Ready to elevate your IT service management? hashtag #ITSM hashtag #FreshService hashtag #Device42 hashtag #ITOperations hashtag #AssetManagement hashtag #IncidentManagement hashtag #CostOptimization hashtag #TechIntegration

item.title:
Looking for a smarter, more cost-effective alternative to traditional CAPTCHA systems?
We bring yo...
item.description: Looking for a smarter, more cost-effective alternative to traditional CAPTCHA systems? We bring you a cutting-edge CAPTCHA solution designed for robust security and seamless integration. Powered by advanced technologies, this solution delivers comprehensive human verification with intuitive slider CAPTCHAs, utilizing track analysis, feature discovery, anti-emulator defenses, device fingerprinting, and PoW verification. Here are the key advantages: ✅ Prevent click farming, spamming and credential stuffing attacks ✅ No blocking issues for mainland browsers, ensuring seamless access for all users ✅ Achieve significant savings with a pricing model that works for your business ✅ Android/ iOS SDK support : Flexibility to integrate across diverse platforms ✅ Fits perfectly with EO, CDN, SSL certificates and domain services Applicable scenarios includes: registration and login, promotion campaigns, forum and voting, data protection ✴️ Time Limited Special Offer: ✴️ Activate today and enjoy 10,000 free calls per month as a new user! 📩 To learn more about this solution, please contact Finda Cloud : hello@finda.cloud hashtag #FindaCloud hashtag #TencentCloud hashtag #Captcha hashtag #Cybersecurity hashtag #Cloudsolutions hashtag #Verification hashtag #Captchaverification hashtag #Nonperceptioncaptcha hashtag #Slidercaptcha hashtag #Graphiccaptcha hashtag #Audiocaptcha
